headline: Marjorie Taylor Greene's Palantir Bet Has Skyrocketed 142% Since She Bought It
summary: Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene (R-Ga.)'s investment in Palantir has seen an impressive surge of 142% since April.

headline: Newsom Wants Your Kids AI-Ready — Google, Adobe, IBM, Microsoft Are In
summary: Newsom unveils no-cost deals with Google, Adobe, IBM and Microsoft to bring AI curricula and training to California high schools, community colleges and CSU, building an AI-ready workforce.

headline: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: AMD, Apple, Eli Lilly — And Wall Street Treads Water
summary: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

headline: Tesla Cybertrucks Picked By US Air Force As Missile Targets To Simulate Real-World Combat Threats
summary: The U.S. Air Force is purchasing two Tesla Inc Cybertrucks specifically for missile target practice at White Sands Missile Range in New Mexico.

headline: Elon Musk's Wealth Takes More Than $60 Billion Hit In 2025, As Bill Gates Also Sees Huge Losses—But One Of Them Has Been Donating His Entire Fortune
summary: Elon Musk's net worth dropped by $61 billion in 2025 due to Tesla's struggles, while Bill Gates also saw a significant loss, but his drop is linked to his commitment to donate his entire fortune to charity.

headline: Amazon's Rising Ad Power Pressures Trade Desk As Shares Plunge Over 38% On Growth Concerns
summary: Trade Desk's stock fell 38.61% despite strong Q2 revenue growth of 19%, as investors worry about rising competition from Amazon and AI.

headline: Tesla Scores Texas Robotaxi Permit, Pitting Elon Musk's Fleet Against Uber, Lyft In Autonomous Ride-Hailing Race
summary: Tesla's Robotaxi got a permit to run a ride-hailing service in Texas, competing with Uber and Lyft, using Model Y cars with safety drivers onboard.

headline: Trump Family Eyes $1.5 Billion Nasdaq Treasury Company To Hold WLFI Token: Report
summary: World Liberty Financial, the Trump family’s crypto venture, is reportedly preparing to launch a publicly traded treasury company that will hold the family’s WLFI token and cash.

headline: Apple's In F1 Race While Tim Cook Sips 'Lemonade' On 'Park Bench' — Dan Ives Warns AI Misstep Could Stain His Legacy
summary: Dan Ives warns that Apple's failure to innovate in AI could harm CEO Tim Cook's legacy, as the company risks falling behind competitors in the rapidly advancing AI race.
